query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A grid of stadium floodlights mounted on a tall structure emits intense white light into thick clouds of fog against a dark night sky. The illuminated vapor diffuses the brightness into a large glowing mass, obscuring the surrounding environment and revealing only faint structural edges near the light source.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grid of stadium floodlights mounted on a tall structure emits intense white light into thick clouds of fog against a dark night sky, rendered with deliberate exposure extremes that blast the light source into an overexposed hotspot while the surrounding darkness remains crushed and underexposed. The dense fog creates low-contrast, oppressive midtones that suffuse the frame with a heavy, suffocating atmosphere, evoking dread and unease through the stark isolation of the harsh artificial beacon in the void.
